text.title: Secrets Management Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-current-secrets
step.action: List every static credential. Tag by env (prod/staging/dev) and criticality.

step.name: stand-up-backend
step.action: Provision Vault / ASM / GSM / KeyVault. Configure least-privilege policies per service identity.

step.name: configure-identity-trust
step.action: Configure IRSA / Workload Identity / OIDC trust between workloads and backend.
step.note: Gate: If team still uses static keys, STOP — eradicate before continuing.

step.name: migrate-via-eso
step.action: Install ESO. Replace kubectl create secret with ExternalSecret manifests pointing to backend. Validate pods read correctly.

step.name: enable-rotation-and-audit
step.action: Configure dynamic credentials engines for databases. Enable audit-log shipping to a separate account. Set 30-day rotation on static secrets.
